title: Ashen Hearts
description: A modpack designed around Kingdom Hearts and Dark Souls with emphasis around exploration and magic.
body:
This modpack is centered around the Kingdom Keys, Souls-Like Universe, Dark Souls Expansion, and Epic Fight mods. The goal of this modpack was to bring together the aspects of the Kingdom Hearts and Dark Souls series of games along with a visual spectical.

The Distant Horizon and terrain generation mods alongside the installed shader packs also aim to improve the visual experience of the modpack. Please note that these features are resource-intensive, so adjust settings carefully based on your system.

It's recommened to run the Modpack at least 5GB of allocated memory. When running at 10GB of allocated memory, it uses upwards of 8GB so please be aware this modpack is very memory intensive.

I also want to particularly mention Linzi's Neighborly mod which can be found bellow. While not added into the base modpack, I feel that it really emphasises the theme of connection and close bonds found in Kingdom Hearts so I recommend adding it to your game. (Plus I love Animal Crossing lol)

Check out their mod here:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/neighborly
